event: Charity of Saint Elizabeth of Hungary
symbols: bread being distributed — the corporal work of mercy, feeding the hungry
golden halo — sanctity through charitable works
stone church doorway — the Church as the source and context of charity
kneeling supplicants — the poor and suffering who receive the gifts of mercy
basket of bread — the abundance of charity flowing from a generous heart
description: A young woman with a golden halo, dressed in a white robe and red mantle, stands on the stone steps of a Romanesque church doorway. She extends bread from a basket to a kneeling figure in dark robes who bows before her. Behind the kneeling figure, other poor and needy people wait, including a woman holding an infant and figures in worn clothing. The stone architecture features carved arches and columns. The scene is rendered in warm, naturalistic tones with careful attention to the textures of stone, fabric, and flesh.

_meta.title: Charity of St. Elizabeth of Hungary
